_review_reason: Per Convention C: 'Conditional credits (after $X spend) → EXCLUDE'. $100 JetBlue Vacations credit requires purchasing a Vacations package of $100+ — conditional on specific spend category, not unconditional recurring credit. Excluded.
_excluded: $100 JetBlue Vacations credit (conditional on package purchase $100+)
Free first checked bag for 4 passengers (qualitative)
